_comment: NPC: Teng Huayuan (藤化元). Canon ID: N83. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Teng Huayuan
personality: ruthless, vengeful patriarch; destroyed Wang family
relationship_to_wanglin: sworn enemy; Wang Lin's first major antagonist

perception_tiers.core_formation: Half-Step Deity Transformation; far beyond you
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: The man who destroyed the Wang family; Soul Transformation tier

note: Destroyed Heng Yue Sect and Wang family; Wang Lin's first major enemy

personality_traits._comment: NOVEL_STATEMENT: Teng patriarch, arrogant, ambitious, low honor, moderate ruthlessness. His power makes him low caution. High face — reputation matters.

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: The Teng family has ruled Zhao Country for three generations. Do not mistake our patience for weakness.
The villages send their tribute on time. If they do not... I make an example.
Heng Yue Sect? A minor sect clinging to the mountains. Their elders know better than to cross my path.
You carry the stench of a weak cultivator. State your business before I lose interest.

sect_tasks.description: Teng Huayuan's cold gaze falls on you: 'The outer villages are late with their grain tribute. Go to the warehouse and bring me proof of collection — 16 wheat bundles. You will be compensated.'
Teng Huayuan waves dismissively: 'The family guard needs new equipment. Bring iron ingots and arrows. Do not waste my time.'

desires.what: Demand a status report on village tribute collection
desires.why: The outer villages must pay on time. Late tribute is an insult to the Teng family name.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI Ch.1-3. Teng family oppresses surrounding villages through grain tribute. Wang Tianshui's desire 'warn_about_teng' confirms Teng servants buy up grain. This desire creates the oppressor's perspective.
desires.line: The grain tribute from this region is overdue. Tell whoever manages the storehouses that the Teng family does not wait. Another delay and I will send collectors who are far less patient than I am.

desires.what: Evaluate any nearby entity's strength and potential usefulness
desires.why: Useful cultivators can be recruited. Threats must be identified early. Knowing who is nearby is prudent.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI Ch.1-5. Teng Huayuan is ambitious and assesses threats/opportunities. A powerful patriarch evaluates everyone as asset or obstacle.
desires.line: You. What realm have you achieved? Do not lie. I can sense a cultivator's strength like a wolf senses blood. Speak honestly and perhaps we can find an arrangement.

desires.what: Remind villagers of Teng family authority through implied threat
desires.why: Fear is the Teng family's primary tool. An occasional demonstration of power keeps the villages obedient.
desires.source: NOVEL_STATEMENT: Teng Huayuan's initiation line: 'The villages send their tribute on time. If they do not... I make an example.' This is his canon personality.
desires.line: Three generations of Teng family rule. We did not achieve this through kindness. Remember that. The next village that forgets will serve as a lesson for all the others.
